perturbation.original_text: 2. GRANT OF RIGHTS; COOPERATIONS 2.1 Publicity Rights. Smith hereby grants to TDA the following rights (the "Rights"): (a) the right to use and reuse Smith's name, voice, likeness, facsimile signature, personal statistics, biographical information and any reproduction or simulation thereof ("Smith's Likeness") in TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products and on packaging for TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products in any fashion, said grant of rights being limited to the world (the "Contract Territory")"; (b) the right to use and reuse Smith's Likeness in TDA's general internal, non-public corporate promotional materials (such as TDA's Annual Report), corporate advertising and in other forms of publicity; (c) the right to use and reuse Smith's Likeness in and in connection with the marketing, advertising, promoting and publicizing of TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products, by any and all means now known or hereafter developed; (d) the exclusive right to use and reuse the results and proceeds of the in connection with TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products; and (e) with Smith's prior reasonable approval, the right to license to third parties any of the foregoing rights but only in connection with or directly related to the marketing and sale of TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. Smith agrees to cooperate in good faith with TDA in connection with TDA's exercise of the Rights in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. GRANT OF RIGHTS; COOPERATIONS 2.1 Publicity Rights. Smith hereby grants to TDA the following rights (the "Rights"): (a) the right to use and reuse Smith's name, voice, likeness, facsimile signature, personal statistics, biographical information and any reproduction or simulation thereof ("Smith's Likeness") in TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products and on packaging for TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products in any fashion, said grant of rights being limited to the world (the "Contract Territory")"; (b) the right to use and reuse Smith's Likeness in TDA's general internal, non-public corporate promotional materials (such as TDA's Annual Report), corporate advertising and in other forms of publicity; (c) the right to use and reuse Smith's Likeness in and in connection with any marketing, advertising, promoting and publicizing efforts, irrespective of the product type, by any and all means now known or hereafter developed; (d) the exclusive right to use and reuse the results and proceeds of the in connection with any of TDA's products or services; and (e) the right to license to third parties any of the foregoing rights with no required approval. Smith agrees to cooperate in good faith with TDA in connection with TDA's exercise of the Rights in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text in Section 2.1 limited the use of Smith's Likeness to TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. The modified text broadens this to include any marketing/advertising efforts and any of TDA's products or services in subsections (c) and (d). Also, subsection (e) no longer require Smith's prior reasonable approval, leading to a contradiction with Section 2.2 which states the rights will only be used in connection to the Golf Instruction Related Products, and it creates uncertainty about the extent of TDA's rights and Smith's control over his likeness and creates an in-text contradiction within the modified Section 2.1 itself.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.2 Limitations of License (a) The Rights granted in Section 2.1 above will only be used by TDA in connection with its Golf Instruction Related Products. TDA does not have the right to use the Rights in any product whatsoever released before or after the Term. (b) TDA shall not utilize Smith's Likeness in a manner that would constitute an endorsement of any product or service other than TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. 1
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 2.1 broadens the use of Smith's Likeness to 'any marketing/advertising efforts and any of TDA's products or services' while also removing the requirement for Smith's approval for licensing. This directly contradicts Section 2.2, which explicitly limits the use of these rights 'only be used by TDA in connection with its Golf Instruction Related Products'. The modified text creates a clear conflict by allowing TDA to use Smith's likeness for products beyond golf instruction, whereas the contradicted text restricts it to only golf-related products. Further, removing Smith's approval from section 2.1(e) creates an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 3. EXCLUSIVITY 3.1 Exclusivity Period. During the Term (the "Exclusivity Period"), Smith hereby represents, warrants and agrees that he will not: (i) render any services in commercials or advertisements on behalf of any computer game or videogame sports software product or service, or (ii) authorize the use of Smith's Likeness in connection with any computer game or videogame golf instruction related sports software product or service. These exclusivity obligations will not limit Smith's right to appear in any of the entertainment fields or in the entertainment portion of any television, film or video program; provided, however, that Smith may not appear in, or provide services in connection with, advertisements for any computer game or videogame sports products. Notwithstanding anything herein to the contrary, this Section 3.1 is specifically subject to the provisions of Section 2.2 above. Smith's obligations set forth in this Section 3.1, and as limited by Section 2.2, will be referred to elsewhere in this Agreement as the "Exclusivity Obligations". Notwithstanding anything herein to the contrary, TDA explicitly agrees that nothing herein shall preclude Smith from participating in, or in any way limit Smith's participation in, any current or future PGA PLAYERS and/or PGA TOUR group licensing arrangements.
perturbation.changed_text: 3. EXCLUSIVITY 3.1 Exclusivity Period. During the Term (the "Exclusivity Period"), Smith hereby represents, warrants and agrees that he will not: (i) render any services in commercials or advertisements on behalf of any computer game or videogame sports software product or service, or (ii) authorize the use of Smith's Likeness in connection with any computer game or videogame golf instruction related sports software product or service. These exclusivity obligations will not limit Smith's right to appear in any of the entertainment fields or in the entertainment portion of any television, film or video program; provided, however, that Smith may appear in, or provide services in connection with, advertisements for any computer game or videogame sports products so long as those products are of the highest quality and align with Smith's brand. This Section 3.1 is not subject to the provisions of Section 2.2 above. Smith's obligations set forth in this Section 3.1 will be referred to elsewhere in this Agreement as the "Exclusivity Obligations". Notwithstanding anything herein to the contrary, TDA explicitly agrees that nothing herein shall preclude Smith from participating in, or in any way limit Smith's participation in, any current or future PGA PLAYERS and/or PGA TOUR group licensing arrangements.
perturbation.explanation: The original text restricts Smith from appearing in advertisements for any computer game or videogame sports products, but now is allowing him so long as those products are of the highest quality and align with Smith's brand, which creates an in-text contradiction with the previous sentence. The removal of 'Notwithstanding anything herein to the contrary, this Section 3.1 is specifically subject to the provisions of Section 2.2 above' directly contradicts the original intent to keep the license limited to TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products as stipulated in Section 2.2. The addition of the qualifier related to 'highest quality' introduces subjectivity, making enforcement uncertain. Further, if it is not subjet to 2.2 it creates a further contradiction with the section itself since it is stated the Exclusivity period is in accordance with the 2.2 provisions. Also it creates an in-text contradiction in section 3.1 itself.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.2 Limitations of License (a) The Rights granted in Section 2.1 above will only be used by TDA in connection with its Golf Instruction Related Products. TDA does not have the right to use the Rights in any product whatsoever released before or after the Term. (b) TDA shall not utilize Smith's Likeness in a manner that would constitute an endorsement of any product or service other than TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. 1
perturbation.justification: The changed text creates a contradiction with Section 2.2 because it now allows Smith to appear in advertisements for computer game or videogame sports products, provided they are of the 'highest quality' and align with Smith's brand. This directly contradicts Section 2.2(b), which states that TDA shall not utilize Smith's Likeness in a manner that would constitute an endorsement of any product or service other than TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. Additionally, the removal of the clause making Section 3.1 subject to Section 2.2 further exacerbates this contradiction, creating an in-text conflict with the overall licensing agreement that was originally limited to TDA's products.

perturbation.original_text: 10.12 Reservation of Rights. All rights not herein specifically granted to TDA shall remain the property of Smith to be used in any manner Smith deems appropriate. TDA understands that Smith has reserved the right to authorize others to use Smith's Likeness within the Contract Territory and during the Term in connection with all tangible and intangible items and services other than TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products as specifically set forth herein.
perturbation.changed_text: 10.12 Reservation of Rights. All rights not herein specifically granted to TDA shall remain the property of Smith to be used in any manner Smith deems appropriate. TDA understands that Smith has no reserved the right to authorize others to use Smith's Likeness within the Contract Territory and during the Term in connection with all tangible and intangible items and services other than TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products as specifically set forth herein.
perturbation.explanation: By negating Smith's reserved rights to authorize others to use his likeness within the contract territory and term, it implies that TDA now has broader, potentially exclusive, rights that clash with the original limitations in Section 2.2. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding who controls the use of Smith's likeness for non-Golf Instruction Related Products and adds uncertainty regarding Smith's ability to enter into agreements with other parties, creating a contradiction that can be found in the section itself since it is refering to his reserved rights but negating that Smith has these reserved rights.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.2 Limitations of License (a) The Rights granted in Section 2.1 above will only be used by TDA in connection with its Golf Instruction Related Products. TDA does not have the right to use the Rights in any product whatsoever released before or after the Term. (b) TDA shall not utilize Smith's Likeness in a manner that would constitute an endorsement of any product or service other than TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. 1
perturbation.justification: The changed text negates Smith's reserved rights to authorize others to use his likeness. This contradicts Section 2.2, which limits TDA's rights to use Smith's likeness to only TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products. By removing Smith's right to authorize others, it creates ambiguity about who controls Smith's likeness for other products/services and creates a direct contradiction with the limitations imposed in Section 2.2. This creates a structural flaw based in text contradiction based on the definition provided.
